title: Be Still And Know

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the storm, in the quake
When foundations start to break
You're our shelter through it all
Our refuge when we call
When darkness surrounds our way
You're the light that makes us brave

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The rivers of mercy flow sweet
Through Your city, through these streets
Making glad the hearts who dwell
In Your presence, all is well

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Be still and know that I am God
Let your weapons fall, let your fears dissolve
Be still and know that I am God
Nations bow and kingdoms fall
But I remain through it all

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Though the mountains shake and slide
Into depths of raging tides
Though the waters roar and foam
You remain our steady home
Your voice melts the frozen ground
Earth transforms at just the sound

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The Lord of Hosts stands with us now
The God of Jacob, our fortress proud
No morning dawns without Your grace
No battle ends without Your face

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Be still and know that I am God
Let your weapons fall, let your fears dissolve
Be still and know that I am God
Nations bow and kingdoms fall
But I remain through it all
Be still, be still
And know that I am God
Be still, be still
And watch My glory unfold
(Be still...)

epigraph: and know that I am God
